summary: Comprehensive testing of FoodHub food delivery application completed successfully. All backend APIs working (23/23 tests passed). Frontend UI functional with all major features working including authentication, restaurant browsing, cart, and dashboards for all user roles.

integration_issues.issue: Minor timing issues in checkout flow - cart functionality works but checkout button occasionally not found

passed_tests: Customer login and home page access
Restaurant owner login and dashboard access
Restaurant detail page with menu items
Admin dashboard with stats and user management
All authentication flows for 3 user types
